samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Detection circuit for a single-bit input IN using a Mealy FSM.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to be detected.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="S0">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="S1">State after detecting '1'.</state>
        <state id="S2">State after detecting '10'.</state>
        <state id="S3">State after detecting '100'.</state>
        <state id="S4">State after detecting '1001'.</state>
        <state id="S5">State after detecting '10011'.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="current_state" width_description="[3:0]">Register to hold current state.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" width_description="[3:0]">Register to hold next state.</reg>
        
        // State transition logic
        <always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST)>
            if (RST) begin
                current_state <= S0;
            end else begin
                current_state <= next_state;
            end
        </always>
        
        // Next state logic
        <always @(*) begin
            case(current_state)
                S0: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S0;
                    end
                end
                
                S1: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = S2;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end
                end
                
                S2: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = S3;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end
                end
                
                S3: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = S4;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S0;
                    end
                end
                
                S4: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = S5;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S0;
                    end
                end
                
                S5: begin
                    if(IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = S2;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end
                end
                
                default: next_state = S0;
            endcase
        end
        
        // Output logic
        <assign MATCH = (current_state == S5 && IN == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    </assign>
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>Mealy FSM detection circuit implemented using sequential logic.</implementation>
</module>
